description: Examination of campaign finance, including: the philosophical rationale behind campaign finance regulations, the history of regulatory frameworks, the influence of campaign contributions on decision making, campaign finance laws in other countries, and reform proposals. Not open to students with credit for POLI SCI 466 prior to fall 2017

prerequisites.prerequisites_text: Sophomore standing and (POLI SCI 104,184, orLEGAL ST/​POLI SCI  217)
